content:
# Platform Prerequisites for Self-Service

Platform engineering has become a hot topic...

Organisations that want to offer self-service platforms need to invest in several prerequisite capabilities. These include documentation, golden paths, and clear service level objectives.

## Documentation First

The foundation of any self-service platform is comprehensive documentation. Teams should be able to discover capabilities, understand how to use them, and troubleshoot issues without filing support tickets.

## Golden Paths

Golden paths provide opinionated, well-supported routes for common tasks. They reduce cognitive load by offering a recommended way to accomplish objectives while still allowing teams to deviate when needed.

## Measuring Developer Satisfaction

Platform teams should treat developers as customers and actively measure their satisfaction. Surveys, NPS scores, and usage metrics all provide valuable signal about platform effectiveness.
title: Platform Prerequisites for Self-Service
description: Organizations need several prerequisites before offering self-service platforms
